content:
https://johnie.se/writing

Disclaimer, Johnie is a colleague of mine but I have no affiliation with the site, blog, or writing.

In particular: his thoughts on software engineering in the age of LLMs have been some that have challenged my (mostly) anti-LLM-for-coding views. His personal story shared in this post sets the context, where his spinal muscular atrophy type 2 impacted his ability to work as a software engineer, and his AI manifesto is really good IMO.
